calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner, Francisco Mendivil Lopez present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the oral testimony and evidence by the petitioner, the Court grants the petition for change of name to: Barbara Mendivil Lopez.
The Court further orders the GENDER of Barbara Mendivil Lopez is changed from MALE to FEMALE
Decree signed in open court.
